titles.title: What Was His Purpose for You?

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The Lord is coming just for you, Why can't you be ready, The life you spend He offers you free, Then have you thought of the cost.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What was His purpose for you on earth? Why did He die for you (and me)? The moments are passing but stop to think, What have you done with God.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your life is meant for His life alone, Why give yourself to the world? He sighed He paid by bearing your sins, Just serve Him alone.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Just give me courage in hardest times, Determination for challenging tasks, Sufficient grace is what I need, To overcome always.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Don't harden your soul in sins deceit, Provocation should not be your guide, For Christ the Lord went toiling on earth, And was the image of God.
